address: Manchester (exact address/postcode TBC — mortgage application stage)
lead_profile_text: Purchasing first Manchester STL property — 3-bed detached with garden, 2-car parking, workspace. Mortgage application in progress (~8-10 weeks to keys from meeting). Existing Belfast BTL portfolio (all flats, unsuitable for STL due to legal/management constraints). Daughter studying at Manchester University — personal use motivation. Concerns about new tenant rights regulations (May 2026) driving preference for STL over LTL.
emotional_profile: Detail-oriented and data-driven investor. Motivated by personal-use flexibility (daughter in Manchester) and better yield vs LTL. Plans to conduct own competitor research before follow-up call.
delay_types: mortgage completion (8-10 weeks from meeting date = late July/early August 2026)

offer_framing: No special offer — standard 15%+VAT rate. 6-month minimum, 3-month notice, no onboarding fees.
